items.title: Portfolio Manager

items.description:
About One Acre Fund

Founded in 2006, One Acre Fund equips 5.5 million smallholder farmers to make their farms more productive. Across nine countries that together are home to two-thirds of Africa's farmers, we provide high-quality farm supplies, tree seedlings, accessible credit, modern agronomic training, and a wide range of other agricultural services. items.title: Investment Director (Lyon, France)
items.description:
ARCHIMED | Job Location : Lyon, France

About ARCHIMED

With offices in Europe, North America and Asia, ARCHIMED is a leading investment firm focused exclusively on healthcare industries. Its mix of operational, medical, scientific and financial expertise allows ARCHIMED to serve as both a strategic and financial partner to healthcare businesses. Prioritized areas of focus include Biopharma Products, Consumer Health, Healthcare IT, In Vitro Diagnostics, Life Science Tools & Biologic Services

items.title: VP de Inversiones en el fondo de Real Estate
items.description:
Bestinver | 
Bestinver, grupo financiero independiente líder con más de 35 años de experiencia, busca incorporar a un VP de Inversiones para su departamento de Real Estate.


Descripción del puesto

- Análisis de mercados.
- Originación y selección de oportunidades de inversión.
- Creación de material y presentación de oportunidades en el comité de inversiones.
- Liderazgo y coordinación de procesos de due diligence de las inversiones.
